reconstruction paper contains the Falsifiability section with branch map and all eleven criteria K1-K11
reconstruction paper status ledger updated (mechanical evidence + still-open list) and manifest extended with the collector
main paper status ledger updated (deferred -> executed with findings) and Z_178 retirement note added
self-containment discipline: the reconstruction paper uses working aliases only inside the terminology remark and literal file paths (spot check: no 'DYN-' outside texttt/remark context)

9b-4 REFRESH carried by both papers: the reconstruction paper's branch map records the executed re-derivation (vacuum / source / contact stages), K4 cites three spectrum treatments, K6 is branch-tagged, K8 is explicitly unpromoted, and the invariance theorem replaces the bookkeeping remark; the main paper's status note records the executed re-derivation

branch_map.kinematic_core: SUSY-agnostic, machine-verified (44+24), untouched by all dynamics results
branch_map.susy_minimal_slice: EXCLUDED (slice family, not model class): unification x proton decay + obstruction map
branch_map.nonsusy_variant: PRELIMINARY: PS 210-compatible marginal (4.3e33, Hyper-K window, TRIPLE-TESTED against the computed 210 and 126bar spectra); G_LR alive (tau ~ 1e36); the 210-only LR vacuum has rare sampled local minima near vev ratios 0.6--0.7, so the 45-adjoint route is an alternative rather than a necessity; among the two unpromoted D3 mechanisms, only the scale-decoupled instanton benchmark survives the price card; this is not an exhaustive source classification; the normalized contact content is branch-independent by the invariance theorem (M_* branch-local)
branch_map.string_conditional: three pricing cards, unpromoted, must not be cited as evidence

kill_bank.statement: fourth sequential chiral family kills the a-priori bound N_fam <= 3 (self-carried-index principle)
Dirac neutrinos remove this Majorana contact target; within the stated nuisance-prior card, all sampled contact fractions exceed 0.01 (not a data posterior)
unification x proton decay excludes the slice family; obstruction map recorded
tau(p -> e+ pi0) = 4.3e33 vs 2.4e34: dead or inside the Hyper-K discovery window
e+ pi0 dominance; G_LR at 1e36 partially probeable; K+ nubar dominance would disfavor the branch
unflavored regression gives a small success fraction, but DYN-7F places M1 in the tau-resolved regime; probabilities and arg-zeta windows are not publishable
historical odd-R ceiling replays arithmetically, but DYN-5V shows that the displayed bilinear has no asserted one-loop anomalous dimension and allows X L H_u

for the fixed archival tower, N2 and N3 lie ABOVE the intermediate gauge scale (39x, 4.8e3x on PS); the instanton benchmark permits this coexistence but does not require it for a generic refitted tower
the historical DYN-5 ceilings replay to a finite zero-mode selectivity gap, but DYN-5V invalidates those ceilings, so no numerical Delta S bound is physics-promotable
preliminary SUSY-breaking toy scan: G_LR window log10 M_SS in [10.30, 15.55]; PS window empty under the stated one-loop/ESH/degenerate-spectrum assumptions
Z_178 diagnostic retired: misses the refreshed card by 4.1e-3 rad vs the 5.4e-5 window (76x)
K4 TRIPLE-TESTED: the Hyper-K window survives the computed 210 spectrum (tree positivity 39/250, tau = 4.25e33 all percentiles) AND the computed 126bar spectrum (45/150 viable, same tau)

kill_bank.branch: non-SUSY LR chain (refresh, CORRECTED by the ratio scan)
kill_bank.statement: the 210-only LR vacuum IS a tree-level local minimum in rare coupling regions at vev ratios near 0.6-0.7 (8/8800 sampled; He-Meljanac 1986 reproduced at claim level); the earlier fixed-ratio negative (0/249 at a/p = 0.8) was an artifact of the fixed ratio; the epsilon invariant neither rescues nor kills any sampled point; the adjoint route is an ALTERNATIVE, not a necessity

K6 is replaced by a branch-tagged unflavored regression: ~6x harder (suppression 0.165, 0/4000 target-band hits without boost, largest scanned hit fraction near x60); no likelihood or thermal kinetics make these viability probabilities, and absence of a gravitino ceiling is not a reheating prediction

K8 remains an unpromoted conditional diagnostic: the fixed archival-kernel ceiling and optional top-like ansatz tension, together with the type-II estimate, disfavor the fixed-kernel renormalizable benchmark, while the leptogenesis comparison lacks a global flavor fit and flavored thermal kinetics; D3 itself remains unpromoted

K2 is refined by the kernel refit: the theta_23 tension is a frozen-anchor property (exact Majorana absorption at unchanged kernels; a 5% Y_e perturbation absorbs it alone) and contact essentiality is lifted to the perturbation level (cf never below 0.01 over 1000 refits with eps up to 0.3)
positive-real rescaling theorem: within the fixed-kernel y>0 family, normalized contact content is exactly invariant and only M_* moves; for complex y, zeta is phase-covariant rather than invariant

blockers: DYN-5 has no valid interacting messenger action and permits X L H_u
DYN-7 and DYN-9b-3 require branch-local flavored kinetics
DYN-9b-2 has not performed a global non-SUSY Spin(10) flavor fit
RE-SC3/4/5 remain unpromoted pricing cards; RE-SC4 inherits an invalid DYN-5 numerical ceiling
